approval.note: Writes run autonomously against staging — no per-action approval. Promoting staging → production is a separate approval-gated operation, not part of this pack.

production_guard.note: The future Hermes runtime must refuse any write whose resolved target is not the client's staging_site_url. There is no production write path in this pack.

notes: Staging-only autonomy: every write tool operates against the resolved staging_target. pack-audit requires a non-null staging_target for this tier so autonomous writes can never default to production.
